2. `[ ... ]` - Need to close this outer bracket.
3. `( ... )` - Inside the bracket, need to close this parenthesis.
4. `{ ... }` - Inside the parenthesis, need to close this brace.
5. `{ ... }` - Another brace, needs closing.
6. `[ < > ]` - Closed.
7. `} )` - Closing the braces and parenthesis from steps 4 & 5.
8. `( )` - Closed parenthesis.
9. `} )]` - Closing brace, parenthesis, and bracket from steps 3 and 2.
10. `{ [ < > ] }` - Closed.
11. `[ [ ( [ ]` - Need to close these.
